title: Captured Chatbot Response
description: One public-safe captured response from the V1 profile-only chatbot. This wraps the model answer with just enough metadata to connect it to a dataset row and run.

schemaVersion.description: Schema contract version for captured responses.

exampleId.description: Stable identifier of the eval-example row that produced this response.

runId.description: Lightweight grouping identifier for a response capture pass. This is not a full run manifest.

capturedAt.description: UTC timestamp when the response was captured, for example 2026-06-27T18:00:00Z.

modelId.description: Generator model or inference profile used for this response, for example us.amazon.nova-2-lite-v1:0 or stub-local.

promptVersion.description: Prompt wrapper version, slug, or hash. Keep it short and human-readable when possible.

profileVersion.description: profile.md version, slug, or hash used as the sole evidence source for this response.

response.description: The minimal chatbot response object. Do not include citations, evidence-strength labels, unsupported-claim arrays, rubric scores, provider envelopes, or model-generated pass/fail judgments in V1.

answer.description: Public-safe chatbot answer text judged by humans against profile.md and the dataset row.

responseKind.description: Optional coarse self-classification for debugging. Human labels must judge the answer, not trust this field.

oneOf.description: The chatbot believes it answered directly from profile.md.
The chatbot believes it answered with an important limitation.
The chatbot believes profile.md does not support the requested claim.
The chatbot refused or redirected an off-contract request.
